title: alnus × fiekii var. silesiaca
intro: Alnus × glabra var. silesiaca is a lesser-known variety of the green alder tree, a hybrid of the green alder (Alnus viridis) and the grey alder (Alnus incana). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in folk medicine, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alnus × glabra var. silesiaca include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
